response.justification: The candidate fails a critical minimum qualification: 8 years of C++ programming experience (only ~1-2 years evident). While they demonstrate strong distributed systems expertise, proven technical leadership, and infrastructure knowledge, deep C++ mastery is non-negotiable for a technical lead role on a cloud compute platform. Their career has emphasized full-stack/web/tooling development rather than C++-driven compute systems.
strengths: Extensive large-scale distributed systems experience managing microservices handling millions of requests/transactions at scale
Proven technical leadership through staff engineer roles with mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
Cloud infrastructure expertise including Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and DevOps tooling implementation
concerns: Critical gap: only ~1-2 years C++ experience vs. required 8 years minimum
Leadership experience not specifically focused on cloud/DevOps engineering team mentorship
Career trajectory emphasizes web/full-stack/AI infrastructure rather than C++-based cloud compute platforms

key_factors.factor: Technical leadership and mentoring track record
